# Workspace Instructions

- Before starting or finalizing any task in this repository, read docs/Umamichi UI conventions.md.
- Treat docs/Umamichi UI conventions.md as the authoritative UI and interaction guideline for this repository.
- For any UI, layout, popup, button, color, spacing, or visual design work, follow docs/Umamichi UI conventions.md unless the user explicitly overrides it.
- Prefer minimal, semantic UI. Do not add decorative visual elements that are not required by content or interaction.
